problem id: b9f42afb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  10111010 -> 11111110
  00001011 -> 01011010
  11100101 -> 00010001
  00001010 -> 01010010
  11101100 -> 01011011
  00010100 -> 10100101
  10001001 -> 01101010
  11110000 -> 10111100

query: 01110000
predicted answer: 10011100
